title: Gary Kenagy
compiled_truth: Gary Kenagy is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-22 to 2002-03-12), Gary Kenagy sent 19 and received 25 emails, totalling 44 interactions.
